title: Crime fighters call for information after farm burglary
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou crime fighters...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou crime fighters are calling on residents for assistance following a burglary on a farm in Wittedrift last week.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou crime fighters are calling on residents for assistance following a burglary on a farm in Wittedrift last week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Plettenberg Bay Crime Prevention Association (PBCPA) operations head Otto Olivier said the burglary happened on Folkstone Stud Farm in Wittedrift during the night of 5 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added that not only did the suspects steal diesel from the tractors on the farm, but also broke into a builders' container containing a large number of valuable building tools and equipment.","html":"He added that not only did the suspects steal diesel from the tractors on the farm, but also broke into a builders' container containing a large number of valuable building tools and equipment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is believed that the suspects came on foot and left the farm in the direction of the N2 towards Kwanokuthula,\" Olivier said.","html":"\"It is believed that the suspects came on foot and left the farm in the direction of the N2 towards Kwanokuthula,\" Olivier said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He urged anyone with information to contact local police to assist in recovering the stolen goods and the arrest of the suspects.","html":"He urged anyone with information to contact local police to assist in recovering the stolen goods and the arrest of the suspects."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some of the tools include drills and accessories, a blue Mac Africa spanner and tool chest, a heat gun, planer, a powered nail gun, red silicone marine cable, an Ingco grinder and polisher, Makita angle grinder, orbit sander, plunge router and a circular saw.","html":"Some of the tools include drills and accessories, a blue Mac Africa spanner and tool chest, a heat gun, planer, a powered nail gun, red silicone marine cable, an Ingco grinder and polisher, Makita angle grinder, orbit sander, plunge router and a circular saw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Crime fighters call for information after farm burglary
